parameters.jsCode:
return [{ json: {
  action: 'gather_evidence',
  repo_owner: 'octocat',
  repo_name: 'Hello-World',
  pr_number: 42,
  user_request: 'Summarize the changes and risks so I can decide whether to open an issue or a PR.',
  fast_mode: true,
  approve_publish: false,
  github_token: '',
  ollama_host: 'http://127.0.0.1:11434',
  agent_model: 'qwen2.5:7b'
} }];

parameters.output: ={{ (($json.resolved_action === 'draft_issue' || $json.resolved_action === 'draft_pr') && !$json.confirm_artifact) ? 2 : ({ draft_issue: 0, draft_pr: 1, review_changes: 3, improve_issue: 4, improve_pr: 5, gather_evidence: 2, no_action: 2 })[$json.resolved_action] ?? 2 }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const o = { ...$json }; delete o.github_token; if (o.source && typeof o.source === 'object') delete o.source.github_token; return o; })() }}

parameters.jsCode:

} }];
